title: glochidion zollingeri
intro: Glochidion zollingeri, also known as the Zollinger's milkberry or the Glochidion zollingeri, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Glochidion zollingeri include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-diarrheal agent. Traditional herbal preparations of Glochidion zollingeri include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
